user_prompt: Sanctify the plasma obliterator during maintenance
prayer:
Approach the plasma obliterator with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the plasma obliterator through the Canticle of Containment.
Anoint its volatile coils with sacred promethium-lubricants during this maintenance rite.
Scrutinize flux-vectors and recalibrate annihilation matrices in the Omnissiah's name.
Sanctify the plasma obliterator anew, beseeching unerring fury from its heart.

Present the autogun upon the altar of charge, intoning the Rite of Capacitive Awakening.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to accept the influx of electro-potentia during charging.
Infuse power-cells with sanctified current, murmuring binaric hymns of replenishment.
Monitor amperage flows whilst anointing the autogun's barrel with conductive oils.
Verify the autogun's vigor, praising the Omnissiah for restored ballistic wrath.

user_prompt: The neutron laser needs an operation
prayer:
Commence operation upon the neutron laser with precise auspex invocations.
Awaken the neutron laser's Machine Spirit via the Lexmechanic Activation Doxology.
Align focusing crystals and calibrate emitter arrays in harmonious operation.
Channel subatomic fury through the neutron laser, sanctified by Omnissiah's will.
Conclude the operation with purity seals upon its radiant housings.

Prepare the cogitator by reciting the Litany of Logical Alignment.
Purge errant data-daemons from the cogitator's noospheric vaults.
Anoint logic-engines with myrrh-infused unguents for preparation.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the cogitator's predictive cogwheels.
Seal the cogitator's interfaces with binaric wards of protection.

Circulate cryo-fluids through the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's plasma vents.

Consecrate the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's wings, restored to stratospheric dominion.
